title: There
content:
There all the barrel-hoops are knit,
There all the serpent-tails are bit,
There all the gyres converge in one,
There all the planets drop in the Sun.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "There"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
